description: A high-net-worth customer wants a quote for a personal umbrella policy for extra liability protection.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer has the required underlying liability limits on their auto and home policies.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer's underlying policies meet the minimum requirements for an umbrella.

nodes.task_description: Gather information about any additional risks (e.g., rental properties, watercraft).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all necessary underwriting information.

nodes.task_description: Generate a quote for a $1 million umbrella policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates and presents the quote.
